# Mirza Muhammad Mobeen

> Software Engineer, AI Researcher, Project Manager, Team Lead, and Google Certified Digital Marketer based in Islamabad & Rawalpindi, Pakistan.

## About

Mirza Muhammad Mobeen (also known as Mirza M Mobeen) is a Software Engineer, AI Researcher, Project Manager, Team Lead, and Google Certified Digital Marketer. He is a NUTECH graduate and founder of a charity organization. Currently working as a Software Engineer at Sanwa Comtec K.K, Japan, leading the Pakistan team on Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Industrial Software Automation, Cybersecurity Solutions, and IBM i Systems.
